title: Keto Polish Pierogi
description: A keto version of traditional Polish pierogi, made with rich, flaky dough and filled with a delicious pierogi-inspired filling.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine almond flour and salt.
Add beaten egg and mix until dough comes together.
Knead dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
Roll out each piece into a thin circle.
Place 1 tablespoon of pierogi filling in the center of each circle.
Fold dough over filling and press edges together to seal.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add pierogi and cook for 2-3 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
